title: Increase Span header logo prominence on desktop/mobile and fix favicon rendering
close_reason: Enlarged header logo substantially on desktop/mobile, fixed favicon exports and cache-busted icon links, verified live production on desktop and mobile.

title: Integrate provided Span AI logos into header, favicon, and social assets
close_reason: Integrated provided logos into header, favicon set, and social image; verified with astro check/build and Playwright.

title: Execute approved Span AI Solutions Astro landing page plan
Write implementation plan after Span AI design spec approval
Write approved Span AI Solutions website design spec
Right-size homepage wordmark and header spacing
description: The homepage header wordmark still reads oversized after the SVG crop, and there is too much empty space above the hero panel. Update the header rendering so the wordmark displays about 25% smaller, uses the correct aspect ratio without distorted blank space, and tighten the top-of-page spacing to better balance the hero.
close_reason: Reduced the homepage wordmark to a width-based responsive size, corrected its intrinsic aspect ratio metadata so it no longer renders with distorted empty space, and tightened the hero top padding to remove the oversized gap above the hero panel.

title: Add email-signature logo SVG asset
description: Create a new logo-email-sig.svg asset by copying the cropped black-text SVG, keep the source asset under logos/, expose the same asset under public/brand via the brand generation script, and push the change so the hosted brand assets stay aligned.
close_reason: Added logo-email-sig.svg as an exact copy of the cropped black-text wordmark in logos/, and updated brand asset generation so public/brand/logo-email-sig.svg is published alongside the existing brand assets.

title: Crop excess whitespace from wordmark SVGs
description: The black-text and white-text SVG wordmarks have large intrinsic blank margins, which makes them awkward to use in Markdown/HTML without extra CSS. Tighten the SVG viewBox to a near-content crop with about 2% padding, propagate the change to source/public/dist copies, and keep the site assets/build consistent.
close_reason: Cropped oversized whitespace from black/white wordmark SVGs, propagated the tighter viewBox to tracked public copies, and updated brand asset generation for future sync.
